description: User reviews sequence and provides feedback — tests editing and feedback tools

steps.user_prompt: Show me the sequence for the IT consulting campaign
user_prompt_variants: What emails will be sent in the IT consulting campaign?
Let me see the email sequence
Show the campaign sequence for review

steps.user_prompt: Change email 1 subject to: {{first_name}} — contractors abroad?
user_prompt_variants: Update the first email subject to: {{first_name}} — contractors abroad?
I want email 1 to have subject: {{first_name}} — contractors abroad?

steps.user_prompt: The tone is too formal, make it more casual and friendly
user_prompt_variants: Emails are too stiff, relax the tone
Can you make the sequence more conversational? Less corporate-speak
The wording feels robotic, humanize it

steps.user_prompt: Arcee AI should be a target — they do consulting too, not just AI
user_prompt_variants: Mark Arcee AI as target, they're relevant
arcee.ai is actually a consulting firm, make it a target
Override Arcee AI — it IS a target
